title: oncidium albicans
intro: Oncidium albicans, commonly known as the White Oncidium, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Oncidium albicans include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Oncidium albicans can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
